Home.heroTitle: Automation solutions — from design to operations
Home.heroSubtitle: With TEA Group, your plant runs reliably, safely, and efficiently with integrated solutions: control cabinets, PLC/SCADA, and production line automation.
Home.solutionsSubtitle: From design to operations — we partner with your plant end to end.
Home.projectsSubtitle: Selected TEA Group projects, presented as an interactive diagram.
Home.projectsComingSoon: The interactive project tree is being finalized (Phase 3).
Home.pain1Desc: Every hour of stopped production can cost you hundreds of millions in losses. Without a timely maintenance team, a small issue becomes a disaster.
Home.pain2Desc: Production data scattered across departments — no single source of truth, hard to make timely decisions.
Home.pain3Desc: You want to modernize your plant but worry about production disruption, extended downtime, and technical risks.
Home.pain4Desc: Manual inspection misses defects, high rejection rates, difficult traceability when issues arise.
Home.painCta: TEA Group has solutions for each challenge →
Home.testimonialLead: Dozens of plants have partnered with TEA Group — here's what they have to say.

About.title: About
About.lead: Since 2009, TEA Group has partnered with over 50 plants across Vietnam on their automation journey — helping them run more reliably, safely, and efficiently.
About.mission: Building smart, safe, and efficient plants through integrated, sustainable engineering solutions.
About.team: Experienced engineers who keep up with the latest technology to deliver real value to clients.
About.value1Desc: Holding international certifications in automation and industrial electrical engineering, ensuring quality and operational safety.
About.value2Desc: Design and construction compliant with IEC, ISA standards, meeting the rigorous demands of modern plants.
About.value3Desc: Technical team ready to respond anytime, ensuring uninterrupted system operation and minimal downtime.
About.value4Desc: Needs analysis per specific industry — manufacturing, energy, infrastructure — to design the optimal solution.
